description: PayPal USD is now available on the Solana blockchain, enhancing its speed and cost-effectiveness for transactions. Issued by Paxos Trust Company, this integration aims to demonstrate a more efficient way for financial institutions to handle payments.
topic_summary: The launch of PayPal USD on Solana [t=2:40] aims to improve digital currency transactions. The partnership with Paxos and Solana is expected to transition PyUSD from awareness to utility [t=76:35].
